title: IESO LMP Predispatch Hourly Ontario Zonal JSON API
description:
Pre-dispatch hourly LMP values for the Ontario-wide zonal price in IESO. This Ontario Zonal Price (OZNP) is a load-weighted LMP across the entire province that passive loads settle against. 

This price is similar to the old Hourly Ontario Energy Price (HOEP), and was part of a compromise in the design for the Market Renewal Program, which originally planned on using aggregate zonal prices for passive load settlement.
